attach_camera_to_char $PLAYER_ACTOR {xOffset} 2.0 {yOffset} -2.0 {zOffset} 2.0 {xRotation} 0.0 {yRotation} 0.0 {zRotation} 0.0 {tilt} 0.0 {switchStyle} SwitchType.JumpCut
set_fading_colour 255 {g} 9 {b} 9
do_fade 4000 {direction} Fade.Out
wait 4000

wait 0

  not is_char_dead $PLAYER_ACTOR
goto_if_false @DEAD3_110
wait 0

load_all_models_now

:TIMER1
script_name 'TIMER1'
wait 0
$TIME_HOURS, $TIME_MINS = get_time_of_day 
if and
  $TIME_HOURS >= 4
  5 > $TIME_HOURS
goto_if_false @TIMER1
wait 0
set_time_of_day 1 {minutes} 0
wait 610000
goto @TIMER1
terminate_this_script 

:TIMER2
script_name 'TIMER2'
wait 0
$TIME_HOURS, $TIME_MINS = get_time_of_day 
if and
  $TIME_HOURS >= 12
  13 > $TIME_HOURS
goto_if_false @TIMER2
wait 0
set_time_of_day 9 {minutes} 0
wait 610000
goto @TIMER2
terminate_this_script

  has_model_loaded #KEYCARD

$FEATH3 = create_pickup #KEYCARD {pickupType} PickupType.Once {x} 2772.179 {y} -1245.856 {z} 56.6036

  has_pickup_been_collected $FEATH1

goto_if_false @FEATHER_140

  has_pickup_been_collected $FEATH3

:MISSION48
script_name 'MISSION48'
wait 500
allow_pause_in_widescreen True
set_police_ignore_player $PLAYER_CHAR {state} True
do_fade 2000 {direction} Fade.Out
wait 2000
set_player_model $PLAYER_CHAR {modelId} 155
force_weather_now WeatherType.SunnySf
release_weather 
set_char_coordinates $PLAYER_ACTOR {x} -1269.515 {y} -515.0894 {z} 4.3
set_char_heading $PLAYER_ACTOR {heading} 347.9178
switch_widescreen True
$WIDE = 1
set_player_control $PLAYER_CHAR {state} False
request_model #BMYCON
request_model #WMOPREA
request_model #SBFYST
request_model #WMOSCI
request_model #BMORI
request_model #MOLOTOV

goto @MISSION48_144

:MISSION48_144
wait 0
if and
  has_model_loaded #BMYCON
  has_model_loaded #WMOPREA
  has_model_loaded #SBFYST
  has_model_loaded #WMOSCI
  has_model_loaded #BMORI
  has_model_loaded #MOLOTOV
goto_if_false @MISSION48_144
wait 0
$DROMEO_48_1 = create_char PedType.CivMale {modelId} #BMYCON {x} -1270.413 {y} -515.2326 {z} 4.3

$DROMEO_48_2 = create_char PedType.CivMale {modelId} #WMOPREA {x} -1270.73 {y} -518.8896 {z} 4.3
set_char_heading $DROMEO_48_2 {heading} 336.0
$DROMEO_48_3 = create_char PedType.CivMale {modelId} #WMOPREA {x} -1273.73 {y} -517.8896 {z} 4.3
set_char_heading $DROMEO_48_3 {heading} 320.0
$DROMEO_48_4 = create_char PedType.CivMale {modelId} #SBFYST {x} -1272.73 {y} -517.0896 {z} 4.3
set_char_heading $DROMEO_48_4 {heading} 315.0
$DROMEO_48_5 = create_char PedType.CivMale {modelId} #WMOSCI {x} -1269.73 {y} -517.8896 {z} 4.3
set_char_heading $DROMEO_48_5 {heading} 340.0
$DRIO_48_1 = create_char PedType.CivMale {modelId} #BMORI {x} -1262.147 {y} -474.3712 {z} 4.983
set_char_heading $DRIO_48_1 {heading} 300.0
$DRIO_48_2 = create_char PedType.CivMale {modelId} #BMORI {x} -1259.703 {y} -472.6733 {z} 4.983
set_char_heading $DRIO_48_2 {heading} 311.0
set_char_collision $DROMEO_48_1 {state} True
set_char_collision $DROMEO_48_2 {state} True
set_char_collision $DROMEO_48_3 {state} True
set_char_collision $DROMEO_48_4 {state} True
set_char_collision $DROMEO_48_5 {state} True
set_char_collision $DRIO_48_1 {state} True
set_char_collision $DRIO_48_2 {state} True
set_fixed_camera_position -1266.988 {y} -505.6437 {z} 4.983 {upVecOffsetX} 0.0 {upVecOffsetY} 0.0 {upVecOffsetZ} 0.0
point_camera_at_point -1269.515 {y} -515.0894 {z} 4.3 {switchStyle} SwitchType.JumpCut
do_fade 2000 {direction} Fade.In
print_with_number_big 'MIS_455' {num} 0 {duration} 5000 {style} TextStyle.Middle // ~b~Grilled  Chicken

do_fade 2000 {direction} Fade.Out
wait 2000
switch_widescreen False
$WIDE = 0

wait 1000

print_now 'MIS_456' {time} 5000 {flag} 1 // Use torch to fry Driosaurus.
$MARK_DRIO_48_1 = add_blip_for_char $DRIO_48_1
$MARK_DRIO_48_2 = add_blip_for_char $DRIO_48_2
set_group_member $PLAYER_GROUP {handle} $DROMEO_48_1
set_group_member $PLAYER_GROUP {handle} $DROMEO_48_2
set_group_member $PLAYER_GROUP {handle} $DROMEO_48_3
set_group_member $PLAYER_GROUP {handle} $DROMEO_48_4
set_group_member $PLAYER_GROUP {handle} $DROMEO_48_5
goto @MISSION48_699

:MISSION48_699

if and
  not is_char_dead $DROMEO_48_2
  not is_char_dead $DROMEO_48_3
  not is_char_dead $DROMEO_48_4
  not is_char_dead $DROMEO_48_5

wait 0

  not is_char_dead $DROMEO_48_1

:MISSION48_844

  does_char_exist $DROMEO_48_1

  does_char_exist $DRIO_48_2

wait 0

  not locate_char_any_means_char_3d $PLAYER_ACTOR {target} $DINO_51_4 {xRadius} 60.0 {yRadius} 60.0 {zRadius} 60.0 {drawSphere} False
  is_char_dead $DINO_51_4
goto_if_false @FAMILYHUNT_1485
remove_blip $DINO_51_4_MARK
clear_char_tasks $DINO_51_4
remove_group $PLAYER_GROUP
wait 100
set_group_member $PLAYER_GROUP {handle} $DROMEO_51_1
set_group_member $PLAYER_GROUP {handle} $DROMEO_51_2
set_group_member $PLAYER_GROUP {handle} $DROMEO_51_3
set_group_member $PLAYER_GROUP {handle} $DROMEO_51_4
set_group_member $PLAYER_GROUP {handle} $DROMEO_51_5
goto @FAMILYHUNT_835

:FAMILYHUNT_1596
wait 0
remove_blip $RADAR_FAMILY_HOME
remove_sphere $RADAR_SPHERE_FAMILY
do_fade 2000 {direction} Fade.Out
wait 2000
mark_char_as_no_longer_needed $DROMEO_51_1
delete_char $DROMEO_51_1
mark_char_as_no_longer_needed $DROMEO_51_2
delete_char $DROMEO_51_2
mark_char_as_no_longer_needed $DROMEO_51_3
delete_char $DROMEO_51_3
mark_char_as_no_longer_needed $DROMEO_51_4
delete_char $DROMEO_51_4
mark_char_as_no_longer_needed $DROMEO_51_5
delete_char $DROMEO_51_5
mark_char_as_no_longer_needed $DINO_51_1
delete_char $DINO_51_1
mark_char_as_no_longer_needed $DINO_51_2
delete_char $DINO_51_2
mark_char_as_no_longer_needed $DINO_51_3
delete_char $DINO_51_3
mark_char_as_no_longer_needed $DINO_51_4
delete_char $DINO_51_4
mark_char_as_no_longer_needed $DINO_51_5
delete_char $DINO_51_5
increment_int_stat_no_message StatId.Fat {value} 50
increment_int_stat_no_message StatId.Energy {value} 50
do_fade 2000 {direction} Fade.In
$ONMISSION = 0
mission_has_finished 
goto @START51
terminate_this_script 

//-------------Mission 62---------------

:PTEROFLY
script_name 'PTEROFLY'
wait 0
set_area51_sam_site False
do_fade 2000 {direction} Fade.Out
wait 2000
force_weather_now WeatherType.SunnySf
request_animation "BAR"
request_model #DODO
request_model #WMYCONB
request_model #WMYPIZZ
request_model #WFYPRO
load_all_models_now 

:PTEROFLY_72
wait 0
if and
  has_model_loaded #DODO
  has_model_loaded #WMYCONB
  has_model_loaded #WMYPIZZ
  has_model_loaded #WFYPRO
goto_if_false @PTEROFLY_72
$PTERO50 = create_car #DODO {x} -1353.702 {y} -63.2164 {z} 108.668
set_car_heading $PTERO50 {heading} 266.3845
$PTERO50_1 = create_char PedType.CivMale {modelId} #WFYPRO {x} -2729.0129 {y} -1610.738 {z} 138.3
set_char_heading $PTERO50_1 {heading} 352.0
freeze_char_position $PTERO50_1 {state} True
warp_char_into_car $PLAYER_ACTOR {vehicle} $PTERO50
set_car_can_be_damaged $PTERO50 {state} False
set_car_forward_speed $PTERO50 {forwardSpeed} 50.0
set_player_model $PLAYER_CHAR {modelId} 153
set_player_enter_car_button $PLAYER_CHAR {enabled} False
set_player_drunkenness $PLAYER_CHAR {intensity} 100
task_play_anim $PLAYER_ACTOR {animationName} "BARSERVE_LOOP" {animationFile} "BAR" {blendSpeed} 4.0 {loop} False {lockX} False {lockY} 90 {keepLastFrame} False {time} 60000000
restore_camera_jumpcut 
set_camera_behind_player 
do_fade 2000 {direction} Fade.In
print_now 'MIS_810' {time} 5000 {flag} 1 // You can visit the map and place a marker by RBM in place you want to fly.
wait 5500
print_now 'MIS_811' {time} 5000 {flag} 1 // Slow down to the groud to exit the Pterosaurus.

:PTEROFLY_320
wait 0
if and
  is_car_in_air_proper $PTERO50
  not is_car_dead $PTERO50
goto_if_false @PTEROFLY_582
$X50, $Y50, $Z50 = get_car_speed_vector $PTERO50
if 
  $Z50 > 8.0
goto_if_false @PTEROFLY_432
wait 0
task_play_anim $PLAYER_ACTOR {animationName} "BARMAN_IDLE" {animationFile} "BAR" {blendSpeed} 4.0 {loop} False {lockX} False {lockY} 90 {keepLastFrame} False {time} 60000000
goto @PTEROFLY_320

:PTEROFLY_432
wait 0
if 
  is_char_in_car $PLAYER_ACTOR {vehicle} $PTERO50
goto_if_false @PTEROFLY_582
if 
  -8.0 > $Z50
goto_if_false @PTEROFLY_528
wait 0
task_play_anim $PLAYER_ACTOR {animationName} "BARSERVE_IN" {animationFile} "BAR" {blendSpeed} 4.0 {loop} False {lockX} False {lockY} 90 {keepLastFrame} False {time} 60000000
goto @PTEROFLY_320

:PTEROFLY_528
wait 0
task_play_anim $PLAYER_ACTOR {animationName} "BARSERVE_LOOP" {animationFile} "BAR" {blendSpeed} 4.0 {loop} False {lockX} False {lockY} 90 {keepLastFrame} False {time} 60000000
goto @PTEROFLY_320

:PTEROFLY_582
clear_char_tasks $PLAYER_ACTOR
$XX50, $YY50, $ZZ50 = get_char_coordinates $PLAYER_ACTOR
warp_char_from_car_to_coord $PLAYER_ACTOR {x} $XX50 {y} $YY50 {z} $ZZ50
set_player_model $PLAYER_CHAR {modelId} 155
freeze_char_position $PTERO50_1 {state} False
warp_char_into_car $PTERO50_1 {vehicle} $PTERO50
task_play_anim $PTERO50_1 {animationName} "BARMAN_IDLE" {animationFile} "BAR" {blendSpeed} 4.0 {loop} False {lockX} False {lockY} 90 {keepLastFrame} False {time} 60000000
plane_goto_coords $PTERO50 {x} 0.0 {y} 0.0 {z} 160.0 {minAltitude} 0.0 {maxAltitude} 0.0
set_player_drunkenness $PLAYER_CHAR {intensity} 0
wait 1500
set_player_enter_car_button $PLAYER_CHAR {enabled} True
mark_char_as_no_longer_needed $PTERO50_1
delete_char $PTERO50_1
delete_car $PTERO50
$ONMISSION = 0
mission_has_finished 
goto @START51
terminate_this_script

:MICRORAPTOR

wait 0

:MICRORAPTOR_46
wait 0

  has_model_loaded #RCBARON
  has_model_loaded #HMYBE
goto_if_false @MICRORAPTOR_46
wait 0
do_fade 2000 {direction} Fade.In
set_area51_sam_site False
$MICRO50 = create_car #RCBARON {x} 2544.012 {y} -1579.1331 {z} 7.0
set_car_heading $MICRO50 {heading} 90.0
set_car_can_be_damaged $MICRO50 {state} False
set_plane_undercarriage_up $MICRO50 {state} True
set_player_model $PLAYER_CHAR {modelId} 45

warp_char_into_car $PLAYER_ACTOR {vehicle} $MICRO50
task_play_anim $PLAYER_ACTOR {animationName} "BOMBER" {animationFile} "PED" {blendSpeed} 4.0 {loop} False {lockX} False {lockY} False {keepLastFrame} False {time} 60000000
attach_camera_to_vehicle_look_at_char $MICRO50 {xOffset} 0.0 {yOffset} -4.0 {zOffset} 0.5 {char} $PLAYER_ACTOR {tilt} 1.0 {switchStyle} SwitchType.Interpolation
set_player_drunkenness $PLAYER_CHAR {intensity} 70
set_car_coordinates $MICRO50 {x} 2981.2029 {y} -2832.374 {z} 17.7927
set_car_forward_speed $MICRO50 {forwardSpeed} 30.0
set_player_enter_car_button $PLAYER_CHAR {enabled} False

:MICRORAPTOR_272
wait 0
if and
  not is_car_dead $MICRO50
  not is_car_in_air_proper $MICRO50
goto_if_false @MICRORAPTOR_272
wait 0
task_leave_any_car $PLAYER_ACTOR
do_fade 2000 {direction} Fade.Out
wait 2000
do_fade 1000 {direction} Fade.In
clear_char_tasks $PLAYER_ACTOR
set_player_enter_car_button $PLAYER_CHAR {enabled} True
set_player_model $PLAYER_CHAR {modelId} 155
set_char_proofs $PLAYER_ACTOR {bulletProof} False {fireProof} False {explosionProof} False {collisionProof} False {meleeProof} False
set_player_drunkenness $PLAYER_CHAR {intensity} 0
restore_camera_jumpcut 
set_camera_behind_player 
wait 1000
delete_car $MICRO50
$ONMISSION = 0
mission_has_finished 
goto @START51
terminate_this_script
